query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
                            FROM cards c
                            INNER JOIN columns col ON c.current_column_id = col.id
                            WHERE c.assigned_user_id = $1
                              AND c.workspace_id = $2
                              AND col.is_done = FALSE
                              AND c.is_archived = FALSE
                              AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
                              AND c.id != $3
